# Wage Garnishment -- How to Stop It [2026] -- Garnishedwages
> Stop wage garnishment with bankruptcy, exemptions, or negotiation. Learn federal and state limits, and how to fight back. 2026 guide.

## About
garnishedwages.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Emergency Bankruptcy Filing to Stop Garnishment -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/emergency-filing.html
- Exempt Income from Wage Garnishment in Bankruptcy -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/exempt-income.html
- Getting Garnished Money Back in Bankruptcy -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/getting-money-back.html
- Head of Household Garnishment Exemption -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/head-of-household.html
- Wage Garnishment -- How to Stop It [2026] -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/
- Stop Wage Garnishment with Bankruptcy -- How It Works -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/stop-garnishment.html
- How Fast Does Bankruptcy Stop Garnishment? -- Timeline -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/timeline.html
- Wage Garnishment vs Bankruptcy -- Which Is Better? -- Garnishedwages: https://garnishedwages.org/vs-payment-plan.html
